steps.title: Identify what the initial deposit represents
steps.content: The initial deposit is the account balance at the moment the account opened, which is at time $x = 0$ (zero months since the initial deposit). Therefore, the initial deposit is the value $f(0)$, which is the $y$-intercept of the graph.

steps.title: Read the y-intercept from the graph
steps.content: Locate where the line intersects the $y$-axis at $x = 0$. The line crosses the $y$-axis at $y = 15$. That matches choice 15 — the initial deposit is $\$15$.
